calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-24-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: S. Ravinantpapricha, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Jie Zhen Lu was present in pro per with Cantonese Interpreter William Guan.
Party and Interpreter was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by Co-Petitioner (minor's father) Qiu Song Wang, but signed the Petition consented to the name change of the minor.

Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name the minor were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Minor's Name to: Jenny Wei Shan Wang.
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
